allow: Bash(sqlcmd -S ".\\SQLEXPRESS" -E -C -Q "SELECT @@SERVERNAME AS server_name, SERVERPROPERTY\('ProductVersion'\) AS version, SERVERPROPERTY\('Edition'\) AS edition")

Bash("/c/Program Files/Microsoft SQL Server/Client SDK/ODBC/180/Tools/Binn/sqlcmd.exe" -S ".\\SQLEXPRESS" -E -d CarFit -C -Q "SELECT Name FROM AspNetRoles ORDER BY Name; SELECT u.Email, r.Name FROM AspNetUsers u JOIN AspNetUserRoles ur ON ur.UserId=u.Id JOIN AspNetRoles r ON r.Id=ur.RoleId; SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS tables FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_TYPE='BASE TABLE'; SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS view_exists FROM sys.views WHERE name='vw_AvailableCarDetails';")
